title: Vistara is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Vistara is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Vistara is actively seeking a talented and motivated Guest Relations Manager to join our dynamic team in Madurai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Vistara:
Vistara is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in GDS Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vistara!
